title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Evok International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Evok International Enterprises! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Evok International Enterprises:
Evok International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evok International Enterprises!
